summary: Tested new Family Member Profile page feature. All features working correctly after fixing one bug (share holdings filter). Profile page consolidates all financial data for each family member with Income, Tax, Investments, and Super tabs.
passed_tests: Family Member Profile page loads at /family-member/:memberId
Profile shows member name (James Wheeler, Sarah Wheeler)
Profile shows relationship badge (Primary, Spouse)
Profile shows Trust Beneficiary badge when applicable
Profile shows age badge (Age 45, Age 43)
Summary cards show: Taxable Income, Tax Payable, Net Income, Super Balance, Total Wealth
Income tab shows all income sources (Salary, Dividend, Rental, Trust Distribution, Deductions)
Income tab shows pie chart breakdown
Tax tab shows tax calculation (Income Tax, Medicare Levy, Total Tax, Net Income)
Tax tab shows effective and marginal tax rates
Tax tab shows tax optimization opportunities (Trust Distribution, Deductions Review)
Investments tab shows personal share holdings (CBA, BHP for James; WOW for Sarah)
Investments tab shows wealth composition pie chart
Super tab shows current balance and annual SG contribution
Super tab shows 10-year projection chart
Super tab shows optimization strategies (Salary Sacrifice, Spouse Contribution, Carry Forward)
Edit Profile button opens edit form with editable fields
Edit form shows Save Changes and Cancel buttons
Related Pages section has links to Tax Analysis, Income Splitting, Trust Distribution, Share Portfolio
Tax Analysis Sync page has View Profile (eye) button for each family member
Clicking eye button navigates to correct family member profile (/family-member/1 for James)
Member Not Found page displays for invalid member IDs with Back to Tax Analysis button
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: Share holdings filter was using s.ownerName instead of s.ownerId - corrected to match DEFAULT_SHARE_PORTFOLIO data structure
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and default values from App.js PortfolioContext
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested Family Member Profile page at /family-member/:memberId. Fixed one bug where share holdings weren't showing (filter used ownerName instead of ownerId). All 4 tabs (Income, Tax, Investments, Super) work correctly. Edit Profile functionality works. Navigation from Tax Analysis Sync page via eye button works. Data comes from global PortfolioContext (MOCKED - frontend only).

components: Header with avatar, name, badges (relationship, Trust Beneficiary, age)
Summary cards (Taxable Income, Tax Payable, Net Income, Super Balance, Total Wealth)
Income tab with income sources and pie chart
Tax tab with tax calculation, rates, and optimization tips
Investments tab with share holdings and wealth composition
Super tab with balance, projection chart, and strategies
View Profile (eye) button for each family member
Member Not Found page for invalid IDs

bug_fixed.description: Share holdings not showing in Investments tab
bug_fixed.root_cause: Filter used s.ownerName === member.name but DEFAULT_SHARE_PORTFOLIO uses ownerId field

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - stored in React Context and localStorage. No backend database connection.
